title: Problem with two averages
excerpt: I’m analyzing a graph that was created by another team and I noticed that in the configuration it has two average functions. I would like to know if it is a bug and why there are these two averages

posts.author: Dbarranqueiro (Daniel Barranqueiro)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m analyzing a graph that was created by another team and I noticed that in the configuration it has two average functions. I would like to know if it is a bug and why there are these two averages
